active_plan.description: Relative path to active plan file (from artifacts/). Supports cross-project prefix: @{ecosystem}/plans/xxx.md resolves to Projects/{ecosystem}/artifacts/plans/xxx.md. Null or empty when no plan is active.

has_rules.description: Whether this project has custom rules in .agent/rules.md. Used by /open to skip rules check when false.

type.description: Project type. 'ecosystem' denotes a meta-project that coordinates satellite projects. Default: standard.

ecosystem.description: Name of the parent ecosystem (meta-project slug). Set on satellite projects to link them to their ecosystem. Null for standalone or ecosystem projects.

satellites.description: List of satellite project slugs coordinated by this ecosystem project. Only valid when type is 'ecosystem'. Null for standard projects.
